Author: Crystal Job Rank contributors
Name: Crystal Job Rank
Punchline: Post-match CC stats and a separate rating for every job.
Description: Records Crystalline Conflict result screens and calculates a transparent Ranked-only rating for each job. Use /cjr or /cjr reset <JOB|all>.
Changelog: Introduces a recalibrated Ranked-only rating model and local /cjr reset <JOB|all> commands that preserve match history through per-job rating epochs.
